zh.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Edwards是Thomas Edwards和Joanna Westcott的女兒，於1623年12月11日出生在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾維 科華士。她於1645年與John Goodrich在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1670年7月5日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德享年46歲，埋葬在美國康乃狄克州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德維利亞 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Edwards是Thomas Edwards和Joanna Westcott的女儿，于1623年12月11日出生在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾維 科華士。她于1645年与John Goodrich在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1670年7月5日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德享年46岁，埋葬在美国康涅狄格州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德維利亞 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Edwards
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Welsh: variant of Edward , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is also very common among African Americans.

History: One of the earliest American bearers of this very common English surname was William Edwards, the son of Rev. Richard Edwards, a London clergyman in the age of Elizabeth I, who came to New England c. 1640. His descendant Jonathan (1703–58), of East Windsor, CT, was a prominent Congregational clergyman whose New England theology led to the first Great Awakening, a great religious revival.

variants.name: Edward
meanings: English and Welsh: from the Middle English personal name Edward (Old English Ēadweard, from ēad ‘prosperity, fortune’ + w(e)ard ‘guard, ward’). The popularity of the personal name was largely due to its being the name of the sainted Anglo-Saxon king Edward the Confessor and of three kings in the 13th–14th centuries.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Edwards was born on 11 December 1623, in Wyre Forest, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom as the daughter of Thomas Edwards and Joanna Westcott. She married John Goodrich in 1645, in Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 5 July 1670, in Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 46, and was buried in Village Cemetery, Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Edwards est née le 11 décembre 1623, à Wyre Forest, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fille de Thomas Edwards et Joanna Westcott. Elle a épousé John Goodrich en 1645, à Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 5 juillet 1670, à Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 46 ans, et a été enterrée à Village Cemetery, Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, États-Unis.

it.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Edwards è nata il il 11 dicembre 1623 nel Wyre Forest, Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlia di Thomas Edwards e Joanna Westcott. Lei sposato John Goodrich nel 1645, nel Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 5 luglio 1670, nel Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 46 anni, e fu sepolta a Village Cemetery, Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Edwardsは1623年12月11日にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアウイア フォーエストでThomas EdwardsとJoanna Westcottの娘として生まれた。1645年にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ハートフォードウエスエルスフィールドでJohn Goodrichと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1670年7月5日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ハートフォードウエスエルスフィールドで46歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国コネチカット州ハートフォードウエスエルスフィールドヴィラッジ セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Edwards(은)는 1623년 12월 11일 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 윈이르 포레스트에서 Thomas Edwards(와)과 Joanna Westcott의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1645년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 w더스필드에서 John Goodrich(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1670년 7월 5일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 w더스필드에서 46세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 w더스필드 비라지 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.11 December 1623–5 July 1670: 11 de dezembro de 1623–5 de julho de 1670
pt.Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colo: Wethersfield, Hartford, Conecticute, British Colonial America

pt.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Edwards nasceu em 11 de dezembro de 1623, em Wyre Forest, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filha de Thomas Edwards e Joanna Westcott. Ela casou-se com John Goodrich em 1645, em Wethersfield, Hartford, Conecticute, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 5 de julho de 1670, em Wethersfield, Hartford, Conecticute, British Colonial America, com 46 anos, e foi sepultada em Village Cemetery, Wethersfield, Hartford, Conecticute, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.Wethersfield Village Cemetery, Wethersfi: вилладж кеметири, ветирсфиелд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты
ru.Hampton, Charlotte, New York Colony, Bri: хамптон, чарлотт, ню ерк колони, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Edwards родилась 11 декабря 1623 г. в местности вир форест, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. Её родителей звали Thomas Edwards и Joanna Westcott. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Goodrich в 1645 г. в местности ветирсфиелд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла 5 июля 1670 г. в местности ветирсфиелд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 46 лет и была похоронена в местности вилладж кеметири, ветирсфиелд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Edwards nació el 11 de diciembre de 1623, en Wyre Forest, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hija de Thomas Edwards y Joanna Westcott. Se casó con John Goodrich en 1645, en Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 5 de julio de 1670, en Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 46 años, y fue sepultada en Village Cemetery, Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, Estados Unidos.
